embassyGuidance: Save your embassy's 24/7 citizen hotline before you travel. Search "[your country] embassy Vietnam emergency contact" and add it to your phone's favorites.
hospitalGuidance: Search "bệnh viện gần đây" (nearest hospital) in Google Maps or ask hotel/hostel staff — this works even with basic Vietnamese.

helpPhrase.vietnamese: Xin lỗi, tôi đang gặp nguy hiểm và cần giúp đỡ. Xin hãy gọi số 113 (công an) hoặc 115 (cấp cứu) giúp tôi. Cảm ơn bạn.
helpPhrase.english: Sorry, I am in danger and need help. Please call 113 (police) or 115 (ambulance) for me. Thank you.
